action.reasoning: Observation: NLinear val 1.57, much worse than DLinear+NLinear iter4 baseline (val 1.22, eval 0.4867). The current best.pt was overwritten. Analysis: I need to restore the iter-4 setup (DLinear-style with trend+seasonal decomp) which gave 0.4867 on test. Note val loss 1.22 corresponded to test 0.4867 — there's per-channel scale issue. The known SOTA-ish result for ETTh1 96->720 is around 0.43-0.46 with DLinear/NLinear/PatchTST. Let me reproduce the iter-4 model exactly and submit it. Decision: Restore DLinear+NLinear hybrid from iter 4, train with 8 epochs.
